settings.block_des: Leave clients’ skin feeling calm, smooth & protected with Bombshell’s amazing selection of creams, oils, and facial sheet mask skincare products. Find pre-wax care products to prevent wax from sticking to the skin, and post-wax care products for skin relief and ingrown hair prevention. Our wet sheet masks hydrate and rejuvenate the skin while plumping up fine lines and wrinkles to aid in anti-aging, repair blemishes, and diminish dark circles and acne. Avoid ingrown hairs and acne post-waxing with skin pads.

Skincare is a top priority for professionals and clients everywhere, and for good reason! Having the right essential skincare items with the best ingredients to keep your skin feeling as good as it looks will allow you to feel more comfortable and let your skin constantly be in its best shape. Bombshell Wax provides you with the tools as a professional esthetician to leave you and your clients’ skin looking and feeling its best.

settings.block_title_question: What is a good daily skincare routine?
settings.block_description_question: For a balanced skincare routine, start each morning with a gentle cleanser, followed by a vitamin C serum for brightness and protection, a moisturizer suited to your skin type, and SPF 30 or higher for sun defense. At night, cleanse to remove impurities, apply a hydrating or anti-aging serum, and finish with a richer moisturizer for overnight repair. For a weekly boost, gently exfoliate 2-3 times to enhance glow and use a hydrating or clarifying mask once a week. This routine keeps your skin clean, hydrated, and protected!

Focus on balancing oil production without stripping your skin of essential moisture. Start with a gentle, foaming cleanser to remove excess oil and impurities without over-drying. Use a lightweight, oil-free moisturizer to maintain hydration and prevent overproduction of oil. Incorporate a salicylic acid or glycolic acid product to help exfoliate and unclog pores. Always apply a non-comedogenic, matte-finish sunscreen during the day to protect your skin. Avoid harsh scrubs or alcohol-based products that can irritate and trigger more oil production. For a weekly boost, use a clay mask to absorb excess oil and refine pores. Consistency is key to managing oily skin effectively!
